title: Colourworks Plastic Bowls, Unbreakable Pasta Bowls, Lightweight Shatter-Proof Melamine, Set of 4, Classic Colours
features: What You'll Get - Colourworks Set of 4 Plastic Bowls in Classic Colours for Picnics, Kids, and Camping
Virtually Unbreakable - Made from shatter-proof melamine, these bowls are perfect for outdoor dining and children's crafts
Space-Saving Design - Stackable for easy storage in cupboards and great for picnic baskets and cool bags
Fun and Practical - A mix of four bright Colourworks shades to liven up cereals and desserts, and enrich the look and feel of all kitchens
The Ultimate Stylish and Functional Accessory - This elegant set features the beautifully muted colours of the Colourworks Classics palette, complementing any kitchen decor
description: From the manufacturer KitchenCraft Colourworks Colourful Melamine Bowl Set (Classics Palette) Kitchen classics, refined and refashioned with new features and a soft, pastel palette Looking for bowls to suit boisterous kids (or clumsy big kids)? Want to enjoy dining outdoors, but want something a little more sophisticated than paper plates? This set of melamine bowls from KitchenCraft Colourworks is just what you need! Thanks to their tough melamine design, they’re virtually unbreakable and shatter proof, and are nice and lightweight too, so they’re perfect for outdoor dining. Use them for picnics, parties, day trips, caravanning and all sorts of other activities. They’re ideal as practical, everyday pieces of dinnerware too. Use them to serve snacks when friends are round, enjoy your morning breakfast cereal, or treat the kids with ice cream. Having a movie night? They’re perfect for single portions of popcorn, or for sharing sweets and chocolates. Best of all, they couldn’t be further from your boring, everyday bowls. The soft pastel colours of the Colourworks Classics palette gives them a sophisticated look all of their own, and means they’ll match any kitchen décor. Includes 4 snack bowls Diameter: 15 cm (6 inches) Height: 7 cm (3 inches) Capacity: 750 ml (26½ fl oz) Made of 100% melamine Food safe Dishwasher safe Key Features Virtually unbreakable Made from melamine these serving bowls are virtually unbreakable and shatter proof, so are great for using with kids (and clumsy adults!) This also makes them a great choice for outdoor dining. Lightweight As well as being really strong, the bowls are really easy to carry around, which makes them ideal for travel. Pack them in the car when you’re going caravanning, or taking a trip to the beach, and you’ll be all set for lunchtime. Stackable design Whether you’re storing them away in the cupboard or taking them along with you on a picnic, the bowls stack neatly inside one another – making them a great space saver! Dishwasher safe Enjoy bowls of ice-cream, breakfast cereals, fruit salads or a few cheeky snacks – these bowls are dishwasher safe, and will be good as new each time! The Colourworks Classics Palette This set of four melamine bowls are another timeless piece of kitchenware from the KitchenCraft Colourworks Classics range, which refines and rebalances traditional designs for modern and contemporary kitchens. Each bowl features a different complementary colour from the Colourworks Classics palette (Classic Green, Cream, Grey and Blue) ensuring they’re a perfect match for your other Colourworks Classics products, as well as KitchenCraft’s Living Nostalgia range. Enjoy fashioning your own vintage-modern kitchen space. The Colourworks Classics Collection KitchenCraft believes that even the most common, everyday tools can be improved upon- so they’ve turned their heads to reinventing the all-time kitchen classics. Old-school ‘tried and tested’ designs have been refined with soft-but-sturdy silicone coatings and exciting new features for precision pouring, measuring, scooping and serving, to help keep your kitchen running with modern-day efficiency. Available in the simple but sophisticated shades of classic green, cream, blue or grey, the Colourworks Classics collection has a whole host of essential gadgets for the chef who believes cooking should be an elegant affair. Discover everything from vegetable peelers to soft pan mats, soup ladles to 3-in-1 spaghetti spoons, simply by typing 'Colourworks Classics' into your Amazon search bar.
